case_id: Mental Health Intake appointment type creation

pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh line 11 confirm this is the appointment type to be created

Web search on Oscar EMR appointment durations showed common increments (5,10,15,20,30,60), but 45 is also valid. No constraints found limiting to specific increments. Verified through task description match.
Oscar EMR documentation (OSCAR: CUSTOMISE YOUR SCHEDULE Appointments: Change Appointment Colors) confirms Red is a valid appointment type color
Web search confirmed #FF0000 is the standard hex code for the color red (RGB 255,0,0). Multiple sources including color-hex.com and colorhexa.com verified this value.

URL found in task_utils.sh line 140 (ensure_firefox_on_oscar function), setup_oscar.sh lines 295, 325, 347 (Firefox startup). Web search confirmed default Oscar EMR URL is http://localhost:8080/oscar/. Note: login.do is also used for health checks (setup_oscar.sh line 7, task_utils.sh line 26), but login.jsp is used for browser access.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates an appointment type in Oscar EMR (open-osp v24.09.10 running on Docker). The appointment type 'Mental Health Intake' should be created with a 45-minute duration and Red color (#FF0000). The system is accessed at http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp using credentials oscardoc/oscar with PIN 1117. The color code #FF0000 correctly represents red in hexadecimal format.
